Also unlike traditional cookie dough recipes that call refined granulated sugar, you'll sweeten your healthy version with liquid stevia instead.
Stevia plant-based, no-calorie sweetener that contains nothing refined artificial (aka it's clean eating friendly!).
It's also highly concentrated, which really important this recipe!
make this healthy chocolate chip cookie dough taste just sweet traditional recipes, you'd need around honey pure maple syrup.
